commands.repair_reason: Human review is needed for contributor real-behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of the APK host-read boundary; there is no narrow automation repair beyond that.; Needs attention: Needs attention because the diff adds an installable APK MIME to the host-local attachment allowlist; tests alone do not settle that security-boundary policy choice. commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `.apk` MIME mapping, includes APKs in the host-local safe-document allowlist/error/docs, and adds media/outbound tests for APK attachment handling.

PR surface: Source +2, Tests +39, Docs 0. Total +41 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence runtime reproduction was established. Source and upstream file-type behavior show why a real APK can hit an unallowed APK MIME today, but this review did not run an actual APK send/load and the PR test uses only a ZIP magic header.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed for contributor real-behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of the APK host-read boundary; there is no narrow automation repair beyond that.

target.title: Allow host-local APK media sends
target.body:
## Summary
- allow host-read local `.apk` attachments through the existing safe-document gate
- preserve `.apk` as `application/vnd.android.package-archive` in MIME mapping
- add targeted media/outbound tests and a docs note for the host-local APK case

## Why
This is a narrow follow-up to #79658.

`TXT/JSON/YAML/YML` are already covered there. `APK` is a separate real-world outbound file type that still fails on the current host-local media path, so it is split into its own small PR to keep review scope tight.

## Validation
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit-fast.config.ts src/media/mime.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.media.config.ts src/media/web-media.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.infra.config.ts src/infra/outbound/message-action-runner.media.test.ts`
target.author: dankarization
